title: Presidential Aide, Otega Ogra Urges Authenticity in Digital Communication - FinancialEDGE
description: The 9th edition of the Lagos Digital PR Summit brought together communication experts and professionals to discuss the importance of nurturing authentic connections in the digital space. Organized by Upticomm Marketing Company in collaboration with the Nigerian Institute of Public Relations (NIPR) Lagos state chapter, the summit featured lead speakers including Otega Ogra, Senior Special
html: The 9th edition of the Lagos Digital PR Summit brought together communication experts and professionals to discuss the importance of nurturing authentic connections in the digital space.
